content: Our school urgently needs assistance with installing air quality monitoring sensors. We have limited technical expertise and would appreciate guidance or help from another school with experience in this area.
We have successfully implemented a green wall system and are willing to share our experience, suppliers, and maintenance protocols with other schools interested in similar solutions.
Requesting information about cost-effective air purifier options suitable for large classrooms (50+ students). Budget constraints are a major consideration.
Our facility management team has expertise in HVAC optimization. We can provide consultation and support to other schools looking to improve their ventilation systems.
We need help developing educational materials about air quality awareness for students. Looking for resources or collaboration with schools that have existing programs.
We have extra N95 masks in stock and can share them with schools facing supply shortages during high pollution periods. Contact us for coordination.
Seeking technical assistance for interpreting air quality data and setting up alert systems. We have sensors but need help with data management.
We've developed a mobile app for real-time air quality monitoring and alerts. Happy to share the solution and provide training to interested schools.
Our school needs guidance on establishing a health monitoring program for tracking air quality-related symptoms among students. Looking for best practices and templates.
We have partnerships with local air quality experts and can facilitate connections for other schools needing professional consultations or assessments.
Requesting support for implementing a mask distribution program. We need help with procurement, distribution logistics, and student education strategies.
We'd like to organize a workshop for school administrators to share experiences and learn from each other about air quality management challenges and solutions.
